title: winey crispy brazilian taleggio pao
description: A keto-friendly festive Brazilian dish featuring taleggio cheese, crispy on the outside and steamed on the inside, perfect for wine and cheese pairings.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the taleggio cheese, chopped parsley, chopped cilantro, coconut flour, eggs, Parmesan cheese, and sugar-free sweetener until well combined.
Add the melted butter, coconut oil, red wine vinegar, kosher salt, black pepper, and nutmeg to the bowl and mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5-7 minutes until it becomes elastic and smooth.
Shape the dough into a round or oblong shape and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the top of the dough with the remaining melted butter and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
Bake the pao in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until it is golden brown and crispy on the outside and steamed on the inside.
Remove the pao from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for 5-10 minutes before slicing and serving.
To serve, slice the pao in half and serve with your favorite wine and cheese pairings.
Garnish with additional chopped parsley and cilantro, if desired.
